summary: Phase 4 Supplementary Training Audit Export testing completed. All 31 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Supplementary Training section displays correctly on Audit View page with Fully Compliant (2), With Warnings (0), Blocked (0) counts and Training Items summary (12 verified, 0 pending, 0 missing). Export CSV button triggers download successfully.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test employees: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge), ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf (Lawrence Egbeni)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Audit Export Phase 4 fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/audit/training/summary returns organization-wide training compliance summary with fully_compliant=2, with_warnings=0, with_blockers=0, training_items_verified=12, training_items_pending=0, training_items_missing=0, (2) GET /api/audit/employee/{id}/training returns detailed training audit with all required fields including items array with verification metadata (code, title, required_for_role, blocker_for_work, status, detail, completed_at, expires_at, verification_status, verified_by, verified_at, certificate_document_id), (3) GET /api/audit/training/export?format=json returns complete training audit export for all employees, (4) GET /api/audit/training/export?format=csv returns CSV download with correct headers and data, (5) GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-summary includes training_audit section, (6) GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-pdf generates valid PDF (7348 bytes, starts with %PDF-), (7) Audit View page (/portal/audit) shows Supplementary Training section with Fully Compliant, With Warnings, Blocked counts and Training Items summary, (8) Export CSV button on Audit View triggers download with filename training_audit_YYYY-MM-DD.csv, (9) Training audit data matches canonical training evaluation (no recalculation in export layer).

training_audit_summary_endpoint.details: GET /api/audit/training/summary returns total_employees, fully_compliant, with_warnings, with_blockers, training_items_verified/pending/missing/expired, blocked_employees, warning_employees, evaluated_at

employee_training_audit_endpoint.details: GET /api/audit/employee/{id}/training returns overall_status, overall_status_label, blocker_count, warning_count, is_work_ready_from_training, blocking_reasons, warning_reasons, items array with full verification metadata

training_export_json_endpoint.details: GET /api/audit/training/export?format=json returns export_date, total_employees, employees array with training_status, is_work_ready_from_training, blocker_count, warning_count, items

training_export_csv_endpoint.details: GET /api/audit/training/export?format=csv returns CSV with headers: employee_id, employee_name, email, role, training_status, is_work_ready, blocker_count, warning_count, total_required, total_compliant, blocking_reasons

compliance_summary_with_training_audit.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-summary includes training_audit section with all required fields

pdf_export_with_training_section.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-pdf generates valid PDF (7348 bytes) with Supplementary Training section

audit_view_supplementary_training_ui.details: Audit View page shows Supplementary Training section with Fully Compliant (2), With Warnings (0), Blocked (0), Training Items (12 verified, 0 pending, 0 missing)

export_csv_button_ui.details: Export CSV button visible and triggers download with filename training_audit_2026-03-31.csv

data_consistency.details: Training audit data matches canonical training evaluation - no recalculation in export layer

training_audit_fields_verified: items array with code, title, required_for_role, blocker_for_work, status, detail, completed_at, expires_at, verification_status, verified_by, verified_at, certificate_document_id
